summary: P0 DSG Logistics Master Blueprint (8 modules) — full backend + frontend pass. 23 new endpoint tests + 580 regression shields all green. Frontend hub at /dsg-logistics renders all 5 tabs with live API integration.

tests_executed.backend_dsg_logistics_p0: 23/23 PASS (constants, breakdown vibe_ridez+hunger_vibez, safety arm+override, hardware verify compliant/non_compliant, hardware/me, override-console/me, tier/me, kitchen register+dup+me+featured+order+delay, 4 auth-required gates, 4 admin-required gates)
tests_executed.backend_regression_shield: 580/580 PASS (includes 10 new DSG Logistics shields + no-burn_coins() source shield)
tests_executed.frontend_dsg_logistics_hub: PASS — page renders, 5 tabs present (override/hardware/tier/kitchen/constants), breakdown trigger creates brk_* incident + ARMED·15s safety loop, hardware verify shows compliant, kitchen summary + featured-dish + delay actions all execute, constants tab shows 40/30/30 + 0% burn

verified_invariants: Duplicate kitchen registration returns ok:false reason='already_registered'
Kitchen order response shape omits burn fields (no burn_coins> 0 surfaced)
Source-level shield: no burn_coins() invocation in dsg_logistics service
critical_code_review_comments: services/dsg_logistics.py is 616 lines — within budget but approaching the 700 line ceiling; consider splitting Module 8 (Creator Kitchen) into its own service file before adding more flows.

place_live_order: if credit_coins on creator fails AFTER debit on buyer succeeds, the buyer is debited with no recourse. Recommend wrapping debit→credit→recirculate in a try/except with compensating refund.
trigger_breakdown writes ride_credits with user_id=None (TODO comment notes ride service will fill). Until plugged in, audit chain technically incomplete — flag for follow-up.
seed_data_creation: Auto: beta_tester_seeder. Test created 1 TEST_kitchen_* (or used pre-existing kitchen), multiple TEST_job_*/TEST_or_* incidents — all isolated under user_id 8f707bb9-dc0f-43cd-acf4-065f7d86cd54.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DSG Logistics 8-module backend + UI fully green. Beta tester wallet had enough coins for kitchen order to succeed; if a future run lands on insufficient_funds the test still passes (acceptable degraded mode). Frontend /explore registry entry for DSG Logistics Hub was not directly Cmd+K tested — recommend adding next iteration if registry coverage is required.
